## Source: amazon-inspector (660bfcc33bb74e7ed20b985e9e50f5ade9988def6cf29a9a31a9107ea619ed64)
The package whatnot-events was found to contain malicious code.

## Source: ossf-package-analysis (23823d427e9050adb9bb3a72f33c67e335e375e61cf74f31b2f6fd4217f516c0)
The OpenSSF Package Analysis project identified 'whatnot-events' @ 99.0.4 (npm) as malicious.

It is considered malicious because:

- The package communicates with a domain associated with malicious activity.
